---
title: "The Rt. Rev. Edward Stuart Talbot"
---

## The Rt. Rev. Edward Stuart Talbot

**Dates:** 1844-1934

### Description

first warden (1869) of Keble College, Oxford, subsequently Bishop of Rochester, Southwark and Winchester. He married (1870) the Hon. Lavinia Lyttelton.

### Letters

- [To Elizabeth Harcourt Mitchell, July 31, 1899.](../letters/3414_To_Elizabeth_Harcourt_Mitchell.html)
- Letter from May 1st 1876
- Letter from [1875?]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
